title: Genesis of Adams Angels
wikitext:
[]: Genesis of Adam's Angels             Quote Post by Soluzar » Sat May 28, 2005 9:26 am [Created to accomodate the tangent in the "Unit 03!!!" thread. Because I'm biased and I think this topic is interesting. --Reichu] DirtyHamster wrote: They actually want to fuse with Adam. Not Lilith :P And yeah. Where are the Angels ment to come from?

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 9:54 am Soluzar wrote: The egg thingy where Adam was found.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 28, 2005 11:14 am Oroboro wrote: It must very very lonely where ever they com from...

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 11:19 am Reichu wrote: Hamtaro wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 28, 2005 11:55 am DirtyHamster wrote: Hey. :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 11:57 am At the risk of looking like an idiot, I'm gonna guess that all the Angels came from Adams egg *he he hee* except Lilith. She had her own egg. *he he hee* So are the Angels able then to fuse with Lilith as well as Adam? (i'm still not covinced the angels came from adams egg *he he hee*)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 28, 2005 12:01 pm DirtyHamster wrote: At the risk of looking like an idiot, I'm gonna guess that all the Angels came from Adams egg *he he hee* except Lilith. She had her own egg. *he he hee* (i'm still not covinced the angels came from adams egg *he he hee*)

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 12:07 pm Well did anyone actually say in Eva where they came from? I've haven't watched the eps in a while. ...EDIT... Wait. Sandalphon came from a Black Egg! Why didn't it come from a White Egg if its meant to come from Adam?

[]:             Quote Post by Soluzar » Sat May 28, 2005 12:33 pm Reichu wrote: DirtyHamster wrote: Hey. :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat May 28, 2005 2:09 pm DirtyHamtaro wrote: Well did anyone actually say in Eva where they came from? I've haven't watched the eps in a while.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 2:11 pm Well I said it before and I'll say it again. Misato has a terrible habit of making wrong assumptions about the Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sat May 28, 2005 2:14 pm Yes but at this point she knows the truth about everything that nervs been doing because of her mad hacker skillz and a little help from Kaji.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat May 28, 2005 2:18 pm A further question to ponder. When were the angels created. Were they all concieved in the moments following the activation of the antarctic bases Anti-AT Field generators, or had they been there all along, sleeping in the ice either in or around Adam, and were simply released by second impact?

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 2:19 pm Defectron wrote: DirtyHamtaro wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat May 28, 2005 2:37 pm What is all this egg talk about? I thought that "egg" in the context of the angels referred to the 6km radius spheres, one of which the geofront resides in?

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sat May 28, 2005 2:46 pm An Angel born inside a Sphere. Hmmm... ...I'd call that an egg.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat May 28, 2005 2:46 pm DirtyHamtaro wrote: Hey :cry:
